title: ficinia borealis
intro: Ficinia borealis, also known as the northern couch grass or northern couch, is a type of perennial grass native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ficinia borealis include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and inflammation. Ficinia borealis can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be applied topically to the affected area to promote healing and relief.
